name: list_issues
description: Retrieve issues from Linear with flexible filtering. You can filter by team, assignee, status, label, project, priority, and more. Results are paginated using cursor-based pagination (Relay-style). Returns issue details including title, status, priority, assignee, and labels.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query string to fetch issues with optional filters.
parameters.example: { issues(first: 20, filter: { team: { key: { eq: "ENG" } } }) { nodes { id identifier title state { name } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }

parameters.name: first
parameters.description: Number of issues to return (used inside GraphQL query, max 250).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination, fetches results after this cursor.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter object used inside the GraphQL query. Supports team, assignee, state, label, project, priority, and more.

body.query: { issues(first: 20, filter: { team: { key: { eq: "ENG" } }, state: { name: { in: ["In Progress", "Todo"] } } }) { nodes { id identifier title description priority url state { name } assignee { name email } labels { nodes { name } } project { name } createdAt updatedAt } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }

nodes.title: Fix authentication timeout
nodes.description: Users are experiencing timeout errors when logging in with SSO.
